description: Introduces intermediate-level communication skills in varying Chinese settings. Students will learn a wide range of vocabulary, grammar structure and pragmatic usage in situated dialogues. They will improve four language skills (listening, speaking, reading and writing) and pragmatic competence through interactive and meaningful in-class activities and after-class assignments. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 102(or E ASIAN 102 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 201. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 201 prior to Fall 2019.
